Name: Hormel Foods Corporation
Description: Hormel Foods Corporation is an American company founded in 1891 in Austin, Minnesota, by George A. Hormel as George A. Hormel & Company. Originally focusing on the packaging and selling of ham, Spam, sausage and other pork, chicken, beef and lamb products to consumers; by the 1980s, Hormel began offering a wider range of packaged and refrigerated foods.
Address: 1 HORMEL PLACE, AUSTIN, MN, UNITED STATES, 55912-3680
